sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98258" key="sumbebaiwth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμβεβαι-ωτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n98258.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">joint-guarantor</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="http://www.trismegistos.org/text/64708" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii A.D.)</date>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
